title: Bee the Happy Ghast 🐝👻
description: Happy Ghast turned into a bee
body:
For those who didn't like the new happy ghast from the snapshot, this resource pack replaces the happy ghast with a bee


![this is what it looks like in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bd56548cc7ccf9f06174e876cfe3956fe1f2cdf.png)



[please write a review in the discord channel if you liked the resource pack](https://discord.gg/cynDJHSmsX)
